goal: Allow operators to replay captured DeepSeek thinking-mode tool-call messages through the protocol validator and record compact pass/fail state metadata without persisting raw reasoning content.
tests: cargo run --quiet --bin yoyo -- eval fixtures validate --suite local-smoke
hidden_failure_mode: The built-in thinking protocol probe can pass while captured provider replay messages lose reasoning_content across assistant tool-call turns, with no compact diagnostic or state evidence for upstream triage.
